entities.name: PEARL MILLET

entities.description: Regions where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The nutritional quality of the crop, including micronutrients

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition that efforts to enhance pearl millet nutrition aim to overcome

entities.name: PENNISETUM VIOLACEUM
entities.description: A wild relative of pearl millet in the primary genepool used for genetic variability studies

entities.name: PENNISETUM MOLLISSIMUM
entities.description: A wild relative of pearl millet in the primary genepool

entities.name: STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental pressures for which wild relatives of pearl millet are useful sources of resistance

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The genetic diversity of a crop, which can be broadened using wild relatives

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A micronutrient (Fe) assessed for genetic variability in P. violaceum

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient (Zn) assessed for genetic variability in P. violaceum

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional trait assessed for genetic variability in P. violaceum

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: A facility in Patancheru where accessions of P. violaceum are conserved

entities.name: AUGMENTED DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to assess genetic variability among accessions

entities.name: ICP METHOD
entities.description: The analytical method used to measure Fe and Zn content

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics for nutritional traits among accessions
